case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE VS. DAVID LEWIS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, DAVID $4,171.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,216.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
